snippet.title: KAGURABACHI｜Official Teaser Trailer
snippet.description:
KAGURABACHI set for TV Anime Adaptation by Cypic in April 2027!

Official Website: https://anime.kagurabachi.jp/en/
Official X: https://x.com/kb_anime_jp
Official TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@kb_anime_jp

[Introduction]
A single stroke opens a new era, cutting a path from Japan to the world—
Weekly Shonen Jump's Neo-Japanese Sword Action series begins here!

From day one, the Kagurabachi manga has captivated fans, weaving a blood-soaked tale of revenge through breathtaking sword-fight sequences.

And now, known for its uncompromising quality, animation studio Cypic brings the story to life with jaw-dropping visuals!

[Story]
Flames of resolve, kindled by hatred.

Chihiro Rokuhira is a boy who aspires to become a swordsmith, and took daily training under his father Kunishige, a renowned swordsmith. Their days, once filled with laughter, are brutally torn apart by an attack from the mysterious sorcerer organization, the Hishaku.

What is stolen from them are the six Enchanted Blades—swords of immense power capable of shaping the fate of the nation—and the gentle, warm life they once shared.

From that day on, everything changed. In a world engulfed in darkness, Chihiro takes up Enten, the seventh Enchanted Blade left behind by his father, and sets out on a blood-soaked path of revenge.

[Staff]
Original Work: “Kagurabachi” by Takeru Hokazono (Serialized in Shueisha’s Weekly Shonen Jump)
Director: Tetsuya Takeuchi
Character Design: Keigo Sasaki
Production: Cypic
Production Committee Leads: Shochiku & CyberAgent

[Cast]
Chihiro Rokuhira: Taihi Kimura

©Takeru Hokazono/SHUEISHA,Project Kagurabachi
#BachiAnime #カグラバチ #anime #animetrailer

snippet.title: AVENGERS DOOMSDAY: Le trailer cache un énorme SECRET !
snippet.description:
🌙 Il est temps de découvrir les bienfaits d’un bon sommeil grâce aux matelas Emma 💤 

Avec les Promos de Printemps French Days, du 22 Avril au 8 Mai, c’est jusqu’à -50 % sur le site, auxquels s’ajoutent 10 % supplémentaires sur les produits déjà en promotion avec le code “Bukkart” (code valable jusqu’au 23/06). 

⭐ Lien pour profiter de l’offre : https://www.emma.fr/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=influencer&utm_campaign=KevinBukkart&utm_code=BUKKART

🚀 Le trailer d’Avengers Doomsday diffusé à la CinemaCon n’a toujours pas été montré au public, mais les descriptions des journalistes présents permettent déjà de reconstruire une partie de ce que Marvel prépare. Entre les X-Men, les 4 Fantastiques, les New Avengers, Thor, Steve Rogers et Doctor Doom, ce teaser semble confirmer une guerre entre les derniers univers du multivers. Mais surtout, il pose une question centrale : Doom manipule-t-il déjà chaque camp pour provoquer la fin de tout et créer son Battleworld ? Dans cette vidéo, on décrypte les images décrites, les rapports d’insiders, les indices cachés et la possible structure du film jusqu’à Secret Wars.

🔥 Retrouve tout l'univers Bukkart ici : https://www.kevinbukkart.com

Bon visionnage.

Ecriture : Kevin Bukkart
Montage : AlexCalibur

--------------------------------------------------

Au programme :

- Le trailer Avengers Doomsday diffusé à la CinemaCon.
- Le manoir des X-Men, le ciel rouge et les premières traces d’incursion.
- Doctor Doom, son armure, son accent et sa première apparition.
- Le discours de Thor et la réunion des Avengers, New Avengers et 4 Fantastiques.
- Le rôle de Shuri, Namor, Talokan et du Wakanda.
- La confrontation entre Shang-Chi et Gambit.
- Mystique, Yelena, Reed Richards et la tension avec les X-Men.
- Le retour de Steve Rogers et son lien possible avec Mjolnir.
- La place des 4 Fantastiques dans le plan de Doom.
- L’univers des X-Men de la Fox et la connexion avec Days of Future Past.
- La manipulation possible de Doom sur les X-Men et les 4 Fantastiques.
- Le rôle de Thor comme véritable leader de Doomsday.
- La quête de Doom pour absorber des pouvoirs liés aux grands héros du MCU.
- Les artefacts, runes et symboles sur l’armure de Doom.
- Le possible rôle de Wanda, Strange, Loki, Sentry, Franklin et Love.
- La réunion stratégique à Talokan.
- Le retour possible de la TVA et la protection de Loki.
- Les trois univers restants : 616, 828 et 10005.
- La bataille finale en Latverie.
- La victoire probable de Doom et la création du Battleworld.
- L’introduction du troisième acte comme début réel de Secret Wars.
- Le rôle possible des Young Avengers et du radeau de survivants.

---------------------------------------------------

snippet.title: jackass: best and last | Official Trailer (2026 Movie)
snippet.description:
it’s time to relive the best and experience the last. watch the official trailer for jackass: best and last, only in theatres june 26. #jackassmovie #jackassbestandlast

Johnny Knoxville and the gang return for one final fling at the big screen. Featuring all-new stunts and stupidity along with the greatest hits and biggest laughs from the past, jackass: best and last is a joyously raucous celebration of all the mischievous camaraderie that you’ve come to love and expect from these idiots over the past 25 years. So, grab your dumb little buddies, raise your glasses, and come experience the cinematic event that promises to be the last time you’ll ever laugh this hard in a theatre.

snippet.description:
X ► https://twitter.com/ClashRoyale/
Instagram ► https://www.instagram.com/clashroyale
TikTok ► https://www.tiktok.com/@clashroyale
Facebook ► https://www.facebook.com/ClashRoyale/

ENTER THE ARENA
Build your Battle Deck and outsmart the enemy in fast real-time battles. From the creators of CLASH OF CLANS comes a real-time multiplayer battle game starring your favourite Clash characters and more. Start battling against players from around the world!

BECOME A MASTER OF STRATEGY AND DECK BUILDING
Choose unique Cards to your Battle Deck and head to the Arena for Battle!
Place your Cards right and knock down the enemy King and Tower Troops from their Towers in a strategic and fast-paced match.

COLLECT AND UPGRADE 100+ CARDS
Hog Rider! Collect and upgrade 100+ Cards featuring the Clash of Clans troops, spells and defences you know and love and many others. Win battles and progress to new Arenas to unlock powerful new Cards to your collection!

BATTLE YOUR WAY TO THE TOP
Battle your way to the League and Global Tournaments to match against the best players in the world.
Compete for glory and rewards!

SEASONAL EVENTS
Unlock new Seasonal items like Tower Skins, Emotes and powerful Magic Items with the Season Pass and participate in fun Challenges that put your skills to the test!

JOIN A CLAN AND GO TO WAR
Join or form a Clan with other players to share Cards and battle in Clan Wars for BIG rewards!

See you in the Arena!
#ClashRoyale

snippet.title: Lord of Mysteries Specials | Official Trailer | Crunchyroll
snippet.description:
Lord of Mysteries Special: City of Silver and Lord of Mysteries Special: The Marked Hunt are coming to Crunchyroll June 20th! Watch Lord of Mysteries on Crunchyroll! https://got.cr/cc-lompv

CITY OF SILVER
Above the undying gray fog, Klein Moretti, the enigmatic The Fool, presided over the Tarot Club when a new, distant prayer echoed through the mists. Reaching across the veil, he summoned Derrick Berg from the City of Silver—a cursed bastion trapped within the Forsaken Land of God. Through Derrick’s haunting tales, the grim history of this sunless city was unveiled. Seeking salvation for his people, Derrick pledged his soul to The Fool’s grace. From the twenty-two Major Arcana, he chose his mantle: "The Sun."

THE MARKED HUNT
The gathering then turned to matters of blood and ambition. "The Hanged Man," Alger Wilson, proposed a high-stakes exchange. He sought the head of Qilangos, one of the infamous seven Pirate Admirals, and tasked "Justice," Audrey Hall, with leveraging her noble influence in Backlund to hunt the wind-blessed killer.

In the foggy streets of the Loen capital, Audrey’s quest led her to the Beyonder duo, Fors Wall and Xio Derecha. As the web tightened around the Admiral, Klein sought the intervention of his mentor, the mysterious Mr. Azik. By weaving together the threads of divinity, ancient power, and mortal cunning, The Fool ensured the Tarot Club’s first great triumph: the fall of Qilangos.
